comex.title: COMEX
comex.description: Bill clients in Brazil or abroad via Bolepix (BRL) or Bolecripto (USDT/USDC).

items.q: How much does it cost to use EvolueCash?
items.a: Fees vary by operation. Receive via PIX: 1%. Buy/sell crypto: 1.5%. Pay boleto: 1.75%. Transfer crypto on-chain: 0% (network fee only). Full international operation (BR to abroad): around 3.5%. You always see the net amount before confirming — no fine print.

items.q: How long does an international operation take?
items.a: About 2 hours on average, from the initial PIX to the recipient receiving USD in their bank account abroad. Compare with 3 to 5 business days through traditional banks.
Yes. EvolueCash operates with institutional financial infrastructure in partnership in the US, with audited custody. You operate under your CNPJ, with auditable statements and accounting support.
Human support via WhatsApp at +55 47 98912-8640. No IVR, no chatbot, no ticket. Direct conversation.

items.q: Can I pay a supplier who only receives in USD bank?
items.a: Yes. The operation goes BRL → USDT on-chain → final conversion in USD to the recipient's bank account, via our partner network in the US. The supplier doesn't need a crypto wallet.

items.q: Can I receive from international clients in USD?
items.a: Yes. You issue a Bolecripto charge and the client pays in USDT or USDC. You convert to BRL when you want, or hold in digital dollar to use later.

Importers, exporters, liberal professionals (doctors, lawyers, consultants), agencies serving international clients, info-product creators with international audiences, distributors with recurring foreign suppliers, and businesses that want to simplify cash flow in BRL and USD.

items.q: What if I've never used crypto before?
items.a: No problem. Most operations on EvolueCash are in BRL (PIX, boleto). When you need to operate internationally, the platform handles the crypto conversion and final delivery automatically. You don't need to understand blockchain to use it.
